rationale: Educ. Code §43.052 governs creation of the Texas Permanent School Fund Corporation and delegation of investment authority. It has no operative relation to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 43.052. CREATION OF CORPORATION. (a) The State Board of Education may incorporate the Texas Permanent School Fund Corporation and delegate to the corporation the board's authority to manage and invest:
_note: No conflict identified; rule text concerns SBOE corporate structure for fund management, not homestead exemption levels.
